column3: Can be used in a foreach loop for easy iteration over all selected components by type SnekMonoBehaviour
Can be used to check the initialization result after the actual process
Returns true if at least one of the inspected components is enabled

Can be overridden to make the component’s border have a specific color.

By default, this handles the Color switch depending on the component being enabled or disabled.

Can be overridden to make the component’s content have a specific color tint.

By default, this handles the Color switch depending on the component being enabled or disabled.
